categories.description: Top-level editor categories this node belongs to (e.g. 'Development', 'Communication').

url.description: Absolute URL of the documentation page.

credentialDocumentation.description: Links to credential setup documentation for this node.

url.description: Absolute URL of the documentation page.

primaryDocumentation.description: Links to the node's main documentation.

resources.description: External resources linked from the node's editor entry.

alias.description: Search aliases that surface this node when users type related terms (e.g. 'pause' for the Wait node).

$schema.description: URL of the JSON Schema this codex file conforms to. Drives IDE autocompletion and validation; safe to omit.

node.description: Fully-qualified node identifier of the form `<package-name>.<nodeType>` (e.g. `n8n-nodes-base.httpRequest`, `@n8n/n8n-nodes-langchain.lmChatOpenAi`).

nodeVersion.description: Version of the node this codex describes, expressed as a string (e.g. '1.0', '2.1'). Distinct from the package's npm version.

codexVersion.description: Version of the codex format this file targets (e.g. '1.0'). Bumped only when the codex contract itself changes.

description: Canonical schema for `.node.json` (codex) files of community nodes. Generated from `communityNodeCodexFileSchema` in `n8n-workflow`.
